message:
✨ CRDHealth: Add ClusterBadge and cross-cluster support

- Add cluster field to CRD interface
- Generate CRDs for each cluster in mock data
- Show ClusterBadge in CRD list items
- Search now includes cluster name
- "All clusters" shows CRDs from all available clusters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ interface CRD { scope: 'Namespaced' | 'Cluster' status: 'Established' | 'NotEstablished' | 'Terminating' instances: number + cluster: string } type SortByOption = 'status' | 'name' | 'group' | 'instances' @@ -65,20 +66,34 @@ export function CRDHealth({ config }: CRDHealthProps) { return result }, [allClusters, globalSelectedClusters, isAllClustersSelected, customFilter]) - // Mock group: 'argoproj.io', version: 'v1alpha1', scope: 'Namespaced' as const, status: 'Established' as const, instances: 5 }, + ] + + if (selectedCluster) { + return baseCRDs.map(crd => ({ ...crd, cluster: selectedCluster })) + } + + // When no cluster selected, show CRDs from all clusters + const crdsWithClusters: CRD[] = [] + clusters.forEach(c => { + baseCRDs.forEach(crd => { + crdsWithClusters.push({ ...crd, cluster: c.name }) + }) + }) + return crdsWithClusters + }, [selectedCluster, clusters]) // Get unique groups const groups = useMemo(() => { @@ -97,7 +112,8 @@ export
